title: Oracle OTBI Training
description:
OTBI is Oracle Fusion Transactional Business Intelligence. It provides a full range of BI capabilities it helps in collecting data within your organization. Data and reports will be well in time and easy to understand with the help of graph and tablets.

Oracle Fusion Transactional Business Intelligence is a self-driven real-time reporting solution. OTBI can be used by Oracle HCM Cloud service application users and Business users. It has a variety of tools which include Oracle Business Intelligence Enterprise Edition (Oracle BI EE), Oracle Business Intelligence Answers (Oracle BI Answers) and Oracle Business Intelligence Dashboard.

Our Oracle OTBI training course will include topics like Oracle Fusion Financials Flow, Reporting in Fusion Finance, OTBI Overview and capabilities, ad-hoc analyses, Intercompany reporting etc.
